hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in "git commit"*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: CLAUDE.md treats the README TODO list as part of the deliverable. If this commit adds, changes, or removes a feature, verify the TODO list in README.md reflects the change in the same commit. The commit has not run yet — update README.md now and re-stage before invoking the commit, rather than amending afterwards."}}' ;; esac
